---
title: "CV & Résumé"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.visually-hidden}
resume
:::

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

:root {
  --cv-accent: #2563eb;
  --cv-bg-secondary: var(--bs-tertiary-bg, #f5f5f4);
  --cv-text-secondary: var(--bs-secondary-color, #57534e);
  --cv-border: var(--bs-border-color, #e7e5e4);
}

.cv-shell {
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem clamp(1rem, 2vw, 2rem) 5rem;
}

.cv-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--cv-accent);
}

.cv-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.6vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.05;
}

.cv-intro {
  max-width: 52rem;
  margin: 0 0 2.4rem;
  color: var(--cv-text-secondary);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
}

.cv-section-heading {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  color: var(--cv-text-secondary);
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
}

.cv-card {
  border: 1px solid var(--cv-border);
  border-radius: 1.35rem;
  background: var(--cv-bg-secondary);
  padding: 1.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.cv-card-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.cv-card-updated {
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  color: var(--cv-text-secondary);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.cv-button-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

.cv-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 0.9rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--cv-border);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-weight: 600;
  background: var(--bs-body-bg, #fff);
}

.cv-button.primary {
  background: var(--cv-accent);
  border-color: var(--cv-accent);
  color: #fff;
}

.cv-button.primary:hover,
.cv-button.primary:focus {
  color: #fff;
  opacity: 0.92;
}

.cv-embed {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--cv-border);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.cv-embed embed {
  width: 100%;
  height: 700px;
  display: block;
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .cv-shell {
    padding: 2.5rem 1rem 4rem;
  }

  .cv-embed embed {
    height: 500px;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="cv-shell">
  <p class="cv-kicker">CV & Résumé.</p>
  <!-- <p class="cv-title">My Professional History.</p> -->
  <p class="cv-title">A Record of My Work.</p>

  <p class="cv-intro">
    Last updated March 2026. View inline or download as PDF.
  </p>

  <p class="cv-section-heading">Résumé</p>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <p class="cv-card-title">Résumé</p>
    <div class="cv-button-row">
      <a class="cv-button primary" href="resume-html.html">View HTML Résumé</a>
      <a class="cv-button" href="../files/RESUME_EvannsMoralesCuadrado_NOPERSONALINFO.pdf" download>Download PDF</a>
    </div>
    <div class="cv-embed">
      <embed src="../files/RESUME_EvannsMoralesCuadrado_NOPERSONALINFO.pdf" type="application/pdf">
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="cv-section-heading">Full CV</p>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <p class="cv-card-title">Curriculum Vitae</p>
    <div class="cv-button-row">
      <a class="cv-button primary" href="cv-html.html">View HTML CV</a>
      <a class="cv-button" href="../files/CV_EvannsMoralesCuadrado_NOPERSONALINFO.pdf" download>Download PDF</a>
    </div>
    <div class="cv-embed">
      <embed src="../files/CV_EvannsMoralesCuadrado_NOPERSONALINFO.pdf" type="application/pdf">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
